calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Set Aside The D.M.V. Order Of Revocation
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ANGELO SELGA'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Set Aside The D.M.V. Order Of Revocation is taken off calendar pursuant to dismissal of petition filed March 30, 2015. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)
